text: The module displays several targets designed for practicing needle passing, allowing the user to aim the needle precisely using robotic controls.
The demonstration module shows the main artery with smaller side branches. The task involves coagulating the side branches at two distinct points before cutting them in the middle.

The demonstration shows the burning of a vessel using a coagulation tool, followed by an attempt to cut the vessel not directly in the middle, resulting in bleeding. The coagulation tool is then used again to control the bleeding.
